calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Paul Arshawsky, Esq., for Plaintiff: Conard House, Inc.
No appearance by the Defendant: Verna Campbell.
09:20 am. - Plaintiff's witness: Phillip Fong, Alex Volter and James Okesson were sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Management agreement---------------ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - 30 day Notice of rent increase---- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #4 - Three day notice to pay or quit--- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 150 Ninth St., #309, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $822.36
No attorney's fees.
Costs of per Memo of Costs
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for Plaintiff
Eliah Bornstein, Property Manager for Plaintiff, Conrad House
Verna Campbell, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case did not settle. Jury Trial remains.
Parties waive court reporter.
JPT: Cathy Mosbrucher Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter
